name: @hieco/testing
description: Comprehensive testing library for Hiero blockchain development with mock client, fixtures, and custom matchers
author: pow <https://github.com/powxenv>

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/utils/index.ts --outdir ./dist/utils --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/server/index.ts --outdir ./dist/server --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/mock/index.ts --outdir ./dist/mock --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/fixtures/index.ts --outdir ./dist/fixtures --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/fixtures/mirror/index.ts --outdir ./dist/fixtures/mirror --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/fixtures/sdk/index.ts --outdir ./dist/fixtures/sdk --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/matchers/index.ts --outdir ./dist/matchers --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/matchers/core/index.ts --outdir ./dist/matchers/core --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/jest/index.ts --outdir ./dist/jest --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/vitest/index.ts --outdir ./dist/vitest --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bun build ./src/types/index.ts --outdir ./dist/types --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external msw && bunx tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --outDir dist
